title: Vectorize instead of looping row by row
description: Express element-wise work as whole-vector operations rather than explicit for loops over rows.
body: Use when transforming columns or computing element-wise results in R. Do not write a for loop that indexes one element at a time when a vectorized operation exists — R's interpreter overhead per iteration makes that far slower and harder to read. Actions: replace the loop with whole-vector arithmetic, ifelse, or a dplyr mutate; reserve loops for genuinely sequential state. Validation signals include a benchmark showing the vectorized form faster and producing identical output. Risk boundary: vectorizing changes evaluation order, so verify results match the loop before discarding it, especially around NA.
